response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including event-driven architectures and real-time systems, which are relevant to the CTO role. However, his background lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems in production, fintech infrastructure, or leading regulated high-stakes AI deployments. His recent work in AI-agent tooling is promising but not yet demonstrated at scale. Leadership experience is present but not in a CTO-like capacity for a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Proven track record scaling engineering teams and adopting disciplined practices (Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production (most AI work appears tooling-focused)
No clear fintech or credit-risk experience; background is primarily in general web/mobile platforms
Lacks demonstrated experience operating AI systems in regulated environments or high-stakes commercial contexts
